detected_product.title: 오뚜기 즉석국 컵밥 매콤낙지덮밥, 285g, 4개
detected_product.description: 현재 별점 4.5점, 리뷰 821개를 가진 오뚜기 즉석국 컵밥 매콤낙지덮밥, 285g, 4개! 지금 쿠팡에서 더 저렴하고 다양한 즉석덮밥/비빔밥 제품들을 확인해보세요.

notes: No network requests were captured and the HTML provided contains only the page shell/meta tags — the actual product variant/option data is rendered client-side via Coupang's SDP-next React app (likely hydrated from an internal API like /vp/products/{id}/vendoritems or via __NEXT_DATA__). Extracted fields (title, rating, review count, image, brand, category) come from <meta> og tags and <title>. To capture variants reliably, intercept XHR/fetch calls to coupang.com/vp/products/{product_id} endpoints after page load, or parse the __NEXT_DATA__ script tag from the fully-rendered HTML.
